title: ekebergia chevalieri
intro: Ekebergia chevalieri is a species of tree in the family Meliaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ekebergia chevalieri include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Ekebergia chevalieri may include extracts and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
